title: Fractional Knapsack
hints: Since items can be broken, this is a greedy problem, not a DP problem.
Calculate the value per weight ratio for each item: value/weight.
Sort items in descending order of value per weight ratio.
Take items greedily: if an item fits completely, take it. Otherwise, take a fraction of it.
Continue until the knapsack is full or all items are processed.
Multiply the final value by 100 and take the floor to get the answer.
